positive: A vibrant, stylized representation of a serene woodland scene at magic hour. The main subject is a majestic deer with large, gracefully branching antlers, standing in a clearing surrounded by luminous flora. The composition should use strong, clean silhouettes of trees and foliage against a dramatic, gradient sky of deep indigo, lavender, and burnt orange. Focus on a limited, jewel-toned color palette (emerald green, sapphire blue, ruby red, gold accents). Stylistic inspiration: Art Nouveau meets modern vector illustration, characterized by flowing lines and high contrast. The print should be designed with central focus and symmetrical negative space for maximum apparel visibility. Minimalist depth of field, perfect for DTG printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, worst quality, noise, duplicate, poor anatomy, ugly, messy, extra limbs
